CreateEipBp.name: Bandwidth package name; auto-generated if not specified
CreateEipBp.eip: EIP address bound to the bandwidth package
CreateEipBp.eipGroupId: Shared bandwidth ID bound to the bandwidth package
CreateEipBp.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth of the bandwidth package (Mbps)
CreateEipBp.type: Bandwidth package type: BandwidthPackage or AccelerationPackage (cross-border acceleration, Hong Kong region only); default is BandwidthPackage
CreateEipBp.autoReleaseTime: Auto-release time of the bandwidth package in UTC format (e.g. "2019-08-03T20:38:43Z")
CreateEipBp.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to create
CreateEipBp.tags.tagKey: Tag key; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters; length 1-65
CreateEipBp.tags.tagValue: Tag value; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters; length 0-65
CreateEipBp.resourceGroupId: ID of the resource group to bind when creating the bandwidth package
